message:
feat(core,fts5,types): streaming join read boundary, FTS5 visitor-pattern tokenizer, and value pool test hardening

Connection (connection.rs, +168/-):
- Extract prepare_streaming_join_select_read_boundary() consolidating
  the read-boundary logic for both SELECT and INSERT-SELECT streaming
  join paths — handles active-txn memdb refresh, cached-write-txn
  staleness, retained autocommit flush on dirty overlap, and the special
  :memory: mode where pager reload can clobber parked local state
- The INSERT fast path now calls the same boundary function instead of
  a hand-rolled inline version, eliminating behavioral divergence
- retained_boundary_flush_required now also triggers on schema_change_
  boundary (CREATE/ALTER/DROP TABLE), not just PRAGMA/VACUUM/ATTACH/
  DETACH — fixes a bug where a CREATE TABLE after INSERT would not
  flush the parked retained autocommit batch, leaving the INSERT
  invisible to a subsequent external reader
- New test: retained_autocommit_schema_change_flushes_prior_batch
  verifies the INSERT is durably visible after CREATE TABLE
- Expanded FTS5 INSERT-SELECT test with explicit assertion that the
  streaming join preparer accepts the query plan

FTS5 (fsqlite-ext-fts5):
- Refactor Fts5Tokenizer trait: add visit_tokens() as the primary
  method with a default tokenize() implementation that materializes
  tokens via the visitor — eliminates per-token Vec allocation in
  unicode61, ascii, porter, and trigram tokenizers
- Switch Posting.positions from Vec<u32> to SmallVec<[u32; 4]> to
  avoid heap allocation for typical posting lists
- Add smallvec workspace dependency

Types (value.rs, +178/-):
- Harden value pool slab tests: test_slab_basic_alloc_dealloc now
  round-trips 100 values (not 1) to verify LIFO ordering
- test_slab_no_leak uses ITERATIONS=10,000 to verify overflow values
  beyond VALUE_POOL_CAP are dropped, not silently pooled
- test_slab_zero_malloc_steady_state verifies SmallText::overwrite
  reuses the backing heap allocation (pointer stability assertion)
- Add log_value_pool_test_stats helper for diagnostics in CI

VDBE engine:
- Expanded opcode handling (+54 lines) for new streaming join paths

E2E tests:
- correctness_mixed_dml: +159 lines of INSERT-SELECT + schema change
  interaction coverage
- correctness_transactions: +86 lines of retained autocommit boundary
  scenarios
- New bd_abgqx_track_s_register_values test (354 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
